name: Vicious Mockery
description: You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantments at a creature you can see within range. If the target can hear you, it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d4 psychic damage and have disadvantage on its next attack roll.
effect: On failed save: target has disadvantage on its next attack roll.
notes: Bard signature cantrip; wisdom save or take 1d4 psychic + disadvantage on next attack
Target must be able to hear you; mana 2: double effect (damage + attack debuff) makes it strongest debuff cantrip
